subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Youth unto him who, when he heard the Call of God, turned his face toward the Orient of Lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الغلام الی الذی اذا سمع ندآء الله توجه الی مشرق الانوار ان
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @methods of teaching the Cause, @consolation and comfort, @justice and wrath of God
